codeReview.summary: The SQL script in da1f7e5 correctly creates the 27-column experiments table, 5-column budget table with generated remaining, and idempotent budget initialization. However, the feature requirement to verify Dolt auto-commit behavior was not actually satisfied in the implementation evidence.

issues.description: Required auto-commit verification is incomplete. The transcript shows `ss -ltn | grep 3307` failed (server not running), then the worker used manual `dolt add`/`dolt commit` to create log entries. This does not verify the expected behavior "Auto-commit preserves data (visible in dolt log)" under the Dolt SQL server path.
Header comment is stale and says idempotency uses `INSERT IGNORE`, but the script now uses `INSERT ... SELECT ... WHERE NOT EXISTS`. Update the comment to match actual behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: infra-worker skill does not document the Dolt 1.84.1 duplicate-PK panic with `INSERT IGNORE`, which the worker encountered and worked around.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues reports Dolt panic and workaround; skill file /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench/.factory/skills/infra-worker/SKILL.md only says to make scripts idempotent, without this Dolt-specific caveat.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared library is missing the Dolt mode distinction that caused confusion during verification: `dolt sql` local CLI mode did not produce commit-log behavior the worker expected from SQL-server auto-commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton (worker-transcripts.jsonl line 17) includes a detour where the worker reasons about CLI mode vs SQL server auto-commit semantics; no corresponding note exists in .factory/library/environment.md or architecture.md.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature preconditions depended on Dolt SQL server availability, but worker flow proceeded after finding port 3307 down; guidance should explicitly instruct workers to use services.yaml start/healthcheck before validating server-dependent assertions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows `ss -ltn | grep 3307` failed and work continued; .factory/services.yaml includes dolt start/healthcheck commands that were not used.

summary: Schema implementation is largely correct, but this review fails due to missing proof of the required auto-commit behavior under Dolt SQL server conditions. One minor documentation mismatch exists in setup_dolt.sql comments.
